name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive】Dynamic Chip M25453 Apricot, M47209 Black, M25452 White. This Summer Bundle handbag is from the Dégradé series, featuring a fresh drawstring design that adds a summer vibe. The Monogram Empreinte embossed leather body presents a gradient tone, brightening any seasonal look. Dual handles and a detachable crossbody strap offer various stylish carrying ways, making it a perfect companion for day and night.
